ohtani.title: J.T. Ginn shuts down Dodgers in 7-1 win
ohtani.blurb: J.T. Ginn shuts down the Dodgers offense over six innings, plus Jonah Heim, Shea Langeliers, and Alika Williams go yard in the Athletics' 7-1 win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Seiya Suzuki walks it off in Cubs' comeback win
imanaga.blurb: Seiya Suzuki caps off the Cubs' comeback with a walk-off single to beat the Padres, 3-2

suzuki.title: Dansby Swanson's three-homer game leads 23-3 rout
suzuki.blurb: Dansby Swanson crushes three of the Cubs' eight home runs and drives in eight to lead the offense in a 23-3 win over the Padres

yoshida.title: Willson Contreras hits three-run homer in win
yoshida.blurb: Willson Contreras hits three-run home run and Caleb Durbin hits a solo home run in the Red Sox's 6-3 win over the Nationals

okamoto.title: Sean Keys leads the Blue Jays to win on Canada Day
okamoto.blurb: Sean Keys' first Major League home run sparks the Blue Jays in 9-3 win on Canada Day

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Mookie Betts shines on offense, defense in 4-2 win
matsui.blurb: Mookie Betts has a two-run single and a game-ending double play while Shohei Ohtani adds an RBI in the Dodgers' 4-2 win over the Padres
